1 (a) Cervical region/neck region. ‘ (1 mark)

2. (a) 6] The stem from L is firm/hard/stiff.
The stem from L, is soft. (2 marks)
(ii) Solution L,is hypotonic to the cell sap,;
Water moved into the stem cells by osmosis;
Cells of the stem become turgid;
Solution L, is hypertonic; -
Water moves out of the cells by osmosis making the cells flaccid. -
(5 marks)
(b) @ Material in L, - The slit opens wider; and they bend backwards.
Material in L, - The strips remain close together. (3 marks)
(i) In L, cells in the inner surface/cut surface enlarged more because they
took in more water; (by osmosis) than the outer cells which have cuticie,
(3 marks)

(ii) SetB - In the dark.
(iii) SetC - Subjected to unilateral light. (3 marks) .
